series_metadata.series_description: This series contains records relating to meetings of the Ohio Electoral College. It includes, but is not limited to, cast electoral ballots for President and Vice President, certificates of ascertainment, certificates of votes, certificates of appointment, planning documents, programs, transcripts, presidential elector lists, and correspondence with electors, political parties, the US Senate and National Archives.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: four (4) years ; Electronic: four (4) years
